title: descurainia preauxiana var. briquetii
intro: Descurainia preauxiana var. briquetii, also known as mountain rocket or rock cress, is a perennial plant belonging to the mustard family and is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Descurainia preauxiana var. briquetii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, and the plant is also used as a food ingredient and ornamental plant.
